falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish structure and invalidate the 'hold' signal
A blowoff score above 65 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the pattern's implied bottoming behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a dramatic policy shift would inject liquidity and invalidate the current 'hold' signal by creating opposing market forces

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
